traits.locale_text:
Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as mental damage.
While Eogunn is affected by {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}, he loses −{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} at the start of each turn.
Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as mental damage.
While Eogunn is affected by {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}, he depletes −{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} at the start of each turn.

Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.
While Eogunn is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, he depletes −{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.text: Эоганн получает 30% урона, нанесенного союзнику под действием {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линии поддержки{/g}, в виде {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}психического урона{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Эоганн получает 30% урона, нанесенного союзнику под действием {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линии поддержки{/g}, в виде {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}психического урона{/g}.
Пока Эоганн испытывает эффект {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузии{/g}, он теряет {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальную энергию{/g} (−{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}) в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.

Эоганн получает 30% урона, нанесенного союзнику под действием {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линии поддержки{/g}, в виде {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}психического урона{/g}.
Пока Эоганн испытывает эффект {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузии{/g}, он теряет {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальную энергию{/g} (−{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}) в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.

languages.text: El 30 % del daño que se inflija a un aliado afectado por la {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g} se inflige a Eogunn como {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}daño mental{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: El 30 % del daño que se inflija a un aliado afectado por la {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g} se inflige a Eogunn como {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}daño mental{/g}.

languages.text: Eogunn erleidet 30 % des Schadens, den ein mit {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Unterstützungslinie{/g} belegter Verbündeter erleidet, als {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}Mentalschaden{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn erleidet 30 % des Schadens, den ein mit {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Unterstützungslinie{/g} belegter Verbündeter erleidet, als {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}Mentalschaden{/g}.

languages.text: Eogunn, {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birime verilen hasarın %30'unu {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}zihinsel hasar{/g} olarak alır.
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birime verilen hasarın %30'unu {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}zihinsel hasar{/g} olarak alır.

languages.text: Eogunn subit 30 % des dégâts infligés à un allié affecté par {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Ligne de soutien{/g} sous forme de {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}dégâts mentaux{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn subit 30 % des dégâts infligés à un allié affecté par {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Ligne de soutien{/g} sous forme de {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}dégâts mentaux{/g}.

languages.text: 受{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}影响的盟友受到伤害时，伊奥贡也会承受等同于该伤害30%的{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 受{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}影响的盟友受到伤害时，伊奥贡也会承受等同于该伤害30%的{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神伤害{/g}。

languages.text: エオガンは、{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援線{/g}の影響を受けている味方が受けたダメージの30%を{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神ダメージ{/g}として受ける。
languages.original_text: Eogunn suffers 30% of the damage dealt to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: エオガンは、{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援線{/g}の影響を受けている味方が受けたダメージの30%を{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神ダメージ{/g}として受ける。
